title: Andy Zipper
compiled_truth: Andy Zipper is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (2000-04-14 to 2004-02-04), Andy Zipper sent 432 and received 1608 emails, totalling 2040 interactions. Top correspondents: [Greg Piper](people/greg-piper) (32), [Errol Mclaughlin](people/errol-mclaughlin) (21), [Louise Kitchen](people/louise-kitchen) (19), [Bob Shults](people/bob-shults) (17), [Michael Bridges](people/michael-bridges) (17). Mailbox folders observed: _americas, archive, calendar, contacts, deleted_items, fundamentals.
